text_block_list.text: —They just simply ran races. They kept running… as though they were on a long journey

She calmly started to tell this tale… 
about the existence of someone and the tracks they left behind.

—Their record was by no means good. 
Everyday their losses kept piling up, without a win in sight—
But no matter how many times they lost… no matter how powerful their opponents were… they stuck to their guns, never stopping, never changing, and they kept running—
Eventually they started thinking "Let me win" or "Today's the day". The people watching them started to encourage them onward.
…Then they arrived at their destination after many years, the conclusion of their long journey, upon foreign soil. Then they… managed to capture a glory unique only to them—
They discovered something in that radiance. The journey they lead was being watched by so many different lives, and each of them gave them their love—

—… And that's the end of the story. 
…Looks like we killed enough time.
choice_data_list: Yeah, that was a great story.
Yeah, that was a great story.

text_block_list.text: Through many spectacular matches, through the changing times, until the very end they won in a dramatic fashion as themselves. Brimming with dreams, it really was a good journey.
Although… questions started to appear in my head. The way she told the story was as though she witnessed it with her own 2 eyes.
I wonder if there was an umamusume in history that matched that story.
If you head just a bit further ahead, there should be civilization there. Good job making it all the way here.
choice_data_list: Thanks for guiding me… are you coming?
Thanks for guiding me… are you coming?

text_block_list.text:
Hm?… Ah, I'm still a bit groggy. 
Anyways, this is where we part ways.
When I heard that, I felt a little reluctant to part ways, my interest in her was overflowing.
choice_data_list: You told me the story yesterday, but…

text_block_list.text: They left an amazing track behind. I repeated this to her again. But in addition—
choice_data_list: Do you look up to that umamusume?
Do you look up to that umamusume?

text_block_list.text: The way her eyes looked as she told their tale— they had a deep impact on her. Those eyes that were gazing off into the distance, with a light twinkle in her eyes—

And that's how I became interested. 
To her, who left those tracks behind.

Hmm～… 
I'm not sure if I look up to them per se—

I'm thinking that I want to "retrace" their steps. 
…Because it seems pretty interesting.

Haha. Man, you really are a little weird, aren't ya. 
…If fate has more in store for us, then we'll see each other again. —See ya.

She then started walking and continued on her own journey. 
I kept watching her until I couldn't see her anymore.
Now that I think about it, I never got the chance to ask for her name. While carrying that one small regret in my heart, I returned home…
—A few days later.
I was in the academy's library looking up any and every single umamusume across history. However, no matter how many pages or books I searched—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: …Hello, Trainer. That's quite a fervor to your research. What are… no, who are you searching for?

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
If you're fine with it, please allow me to assist you. 
As you can see, concerning umamusumes, I'm quite knowledgeable.
I told her about what I researched so far, alongside the umamusume who was on a journey. But—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
…I'm terribly sorry. 
Even I am unaware of such a umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: However, I think I know who it was that told you that story.

That girl is most likely a student of this academy. 
Her name is—
text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna

text_block_list.text: —Stay Gold.
text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna

text_block_list.text: …I wonder why. The second I heard that name— some nostalgic feeling started to rise in my chest—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: …The truth is, I have heard a small part of that story from her as well.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: That story left a strong impression on me, so when I heard you speak about it, I immediately recognized it. I was certain it was the same story.

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text:
…So you too became 
interested in her story.
choice_data_list: I'm curious about whose path she's retracing.

text_block_list.text: …Stay Gold cutting through the rain that day, her running was strong and sharp. Even now that feeling is still engraved into my body.
Her immense talent for running all to retrace the steps of a certain umamusume. Just who on Earth could that person be—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: …If that is what you seek, then I believe asking her yourself would be the best course… Although—

text_block_list.name: Hayakawa Tazuna
text_block_list.text: She's… not usually not around on the campus. Always on one journey or another… We're trying to figure out what we should do as an academy, but…
…Afterwards, I was in my office combing through all the previous mock races that have been held. I wanted to look into Stay Gold's running.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: "Hah… Hah… Hah… Hmph!!"
Her running, even through the crackle of the screen, had a wild roughness to it. But, in that running I saw high potential in her.
Moreover, the most striking thing to me was—
choice_data_list: (… It was just like that day.)

text_block_list.text: After the race, Stay Gold was without a doubt looking off into the distance. Her eyes… they were the same eyes as when she told me about the story of "tracks left behind".
Before I knew it, my interest in Stay Gold was changing. That impulse was about to launch me into a certain journey—
